name: Atlantic Street Acquisition Cor
summary: Atlantic Street Acquisition Cor Warrants represent the right to purchase shares of Atlantic Street Acquisition Corp, a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC). The warrants allow holders to buy ASAQ shares at a specified price within a certain timeframe, contingent upon the SPAC completing an acquisition. SPACs are formed to raise capital through an initial public offering (IPO) for the purpose of acquiring an existing operating company.
